review_title: Amazing tool for marketing, stop wasting time with an all in one solution.
description: I really like, it once I found that I was able to use the post designer effectively with a computer that has more ram I was really satisfied. I really recommend this software if you want to lighten your burden in terms of creation time, stop wasting time finding free templates that look good and spend time planning your posts and let the software do the rest, all from one tool.
author: David I.
pros: - I have all I need in one space which saves me a lot of time.- I can Import my own media or connect my other media libraries to the creative tool and has all the tools necessary for graphic creation, blend modes and even masks.- If I run out of ideas I can go to the quotes and get refreshed, very useful for the creativity droughts. - I can use Ai to write content faster, it helps me to re arrange my ideas and to write video scripts also, very useful when you are burden with a lot of work.- The Ai has categories you can choose which Ai format you would use for example a module named Sonos very useful, I wrote my product description really fast 3 min.- Video creation is coming and I am sure it will make it even more powerful.- After all the creation you can schedule your post in the same platform, so freaking cool!
cons: - I thought the server would do all the heavy processing for the design module but, you actually have to make sure you have over 4GB of ram, or a fast processor, otherwise you will be having a slow creation experience with the graphics only, all the other functions are fine, just the graphics require you to have a more powerful computer.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Creatosaurus is a must have for creators that want to get things done fast & Supremely in one space.
description: Creatosaurus is an A+ company . I am happy to have their product. The support is supreme and their product which is already supreme always anounces new improvements , which is always a cool surprise.
author: Almighty Servant C.
pros: Creatosaurus is a must have for social media creators, and more. I love how it goes beyond social media captions. It features an extensive library of templates that we can use for ai writing of Blogs , newsletters, articles, YouTube scripts, book titles, and so many other things that are too many to list. It is so easy and quick to schedule content, and the ability to have separate workspaces for teams is a HUGE plus. I highly recommend.
cons: Nothing. I love it. I was a bit lost when i first signed up because i didn't take the time to watch any of the tutorials. (I was lazy aka too swamped) But the support team is so amazing. They scheduled a google meets with me and literally walked me through the system via screenshare, showed me things i needed to know and answered all questions that i had and did not know i had.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: All-In-One AI Tool Suite and Social Media Management Software
description: Creatosaurus.io offers an invaluable set of tools for creating all types of content or "telling stories" as they say. It will definitely be a go-to resource that I'll be using for the foreseeable future. If you're looking for a tool like this, make sure to give this one a try.
author: Nathan S.
pros: Get access to a complete range of AI Tools with the added bonus of a social media scheduling feature. I'm able to generate copy for my website, captions for social media, full-length articles for my blog, and the graphics to go with it all. Lot's of different content generators are available to cover any type of content you need. The tool allows for collaboration in workspaces and even though I personally don't need this feature, I can see its usefulness for businesses or teams aiming to work together efficiently.The way the tools are organized separately makes it pretty intuitive to work with, but they also integrate together nicely for smooth workflows.
cons: I noticed that the graphic design templates were very limited compared to similar design tools whih was disappointing. I also think the month-to-month prices were a bit high but If you pay it yearly the prices are reasonable.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Feautures and Easy to Use
author: Steven A.
pros: I love how Creatosaurus has a lot of features as tabs. Sometimes the all-in-one platforms feel like they are stuffing too many things on your plate. I love how Creatosaurus separates them to allow more in-depth focus on each feature.
cons: I feel that the pricing could be lower comparatively to its competitors.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One site management tool for designers
description: not having to upload and download from other sites makes this tool very handy. I like the idea and the whole customer service from the team.
author: Felix R.
pros: I like to create all of my designs and use AI in the same environment.
cons: There are many projects in progress. So far nothing that i have not liked about the tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Superb tool for social media content creation
description: As a budding social media influencer and not from a technical background, it was always a black box to figure out the world of hashtags, algorithms and engagement. Thankfully, Creatosaurus takes a lot off my plate and helps me focus on presenting rather than the logistics
author: Jigna P.
pros: Allows us to create content for instagram and linkedin which can attrack great audiences. Also has AI powered hashtag recommender and captions. The big choice of illustrations make us spoilt for choice in creativity
cons: The platform can be slightly overwhelming for non techies and new beginners due to its plethora of features. It also has a limited free tier
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Its a good platform for the people who want to design and create new templates.
description: Overall experience is excellent and the tools are also great.
author: Yash P.
pros: Its easy to use and different tool’s available at the same place.
cons: Nothing like cons but can add more features.

review_title: Very easy for my professional works as well as personal creative work
description: It's is a good resource for all people with small to large brands
author: yamini A.
pros: Quick, simple and easy to use, more tools and helps with daily task
cons: credit limits are quite low and want some more credits

author: Danilo T.
pros: It has everything can be necessary to create a social media campain.
cons: The UX design that there is now should be done greater.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good as is, with the potential to be great
description: Overall a very positive experience for me.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's relatively simple to use with a familiar interface. They have a fair few templates ready to go to get the creative juices flowing. The UX could do with some improvements, but overall they have a lot of flexibility/options built in. Looking forward to seeing where they go.
cons: Some things are not intuitive or hidden in plain sight and unless you know, it's hard to find out.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
